package rulecoverage

func PositiveValidatorDependsOnRepositoryDirectly() string {
    ruleID := "validator_depends_on_repository_directly"
    family := "architecture"
    severity := "info"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description := "Reusable validator code that reaches into repositories instead of receiving precomputed facts or focused services."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
